caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall with Light Winds Hits Ocho Rios Today
caribbean.paragraph: Ocho Rios is experiencing persistent rainfall with a 100 percent chance of rain, accompanied by light winds sustained at 10 knots and wave heights reaching 2.9 feet from the ENE direction with a 9-second swell period. Conditions in St. Thomas remain relatively calm with winds up to 16 knots and no significant wave activity expected.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Waves Affect Marseille Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing moderate southerly winds reaching 17 knots with wave heights up to 4.3 feet and a swell period of 5 seconds. There is a 50 percent chance of rain, while Istanbul sees lighter winds at 14 knots with less impact on marine conditions.
